top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Slip on Alphabet, Oil Advances: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US equity-index futures declined in early Thursday trading as investors weighed earnings from AI heavyweights for evidence that surging capital spending is translating into growth. Oil extended its rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Banks Trading Parts of $35 Billion AI Chip Deal
top_signals.summary: Wall Street banks have started buying and selling an initial piece of a $35 billion financing package for Broadcom Inc. and Anthropic PBC’s AI infrastructure expansion, with the biggest private credit deal ever now being offered to a wider pool of investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: It’s all about the role of money - speech by Nathanaël Benjamin
top_signals.summary: Given at OMFIF Economic and Monetary Policy Institute

top_signals.title: BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
top_signals.summary: The proposed alliance would enable more than 150 broker-dealers to trade and settle digital asset securities through OTC Link ATS using BitGo’s custody infrastructure.
